cli.root.short: tmux hub — declarative sessions, reload, drift sync
cli.flag.lang: language override (en|ru); takes precedence over config and env
cli.flag.config: path to config.yml (overrides TMH_CONFIG and defaults)
cli.attach.short: Attach to a session (or switch client if already inside tmux)
cli.new.short: Create a session (interactive wizard if flags are omitted)
cli.init.short: Create all configured sessions that aren't already running
cli.kill.short: Kill live sessions whose name contains the pattern
cli.diff.short: Show drift between live tmux and config.yml
cli.reload.short: Re-source ~/.zshrc in idle shell panes and ~/.tmux.conf
cli.scratch.short: Create an ephemeral session, optionally with a TTL
cli.popup.short: Run a command in a tmux popup with env/cwd from config
cli.window.short: Open an ad-hoc window in the current session (not written to config)
cli.layout.save.short: Save the current window layout under NAME
cli.snapshot.short: Save, list, restore, or delete live-state snapshots
cli.snapshot.save.short: Snapshot every live session under NAME (overwrites)
cli.snapshot.restore.short: Recreate sessions from a saved snapshot
cli.undo.short: Restore the most recent destructive action
cli.tmux.audit.short: Check tmux server settings against tmh baseline + recommended list
cli.tmux.setup.short: Generate a tmux.conf snippet for tmh; --append writes to ~/.tmux.conf
cli.flag.new.name: session name
cli.flag.new.save: also write this session to config.yml
cli.flag.export.minimal: redact secrets and rewrite absolute paths via roots
cli.flag.export.only: export only this session (implies --minimal=false unless set)
cli.flag.popup.no_env: do not inherit env from config
cli.flag.popup.no_cwd: do not inherit cwd from config
cli.flag.popup.session: session name to derive env/cwd from
cli.flag.popup.window: window name to derive cwd from
cli.flag.sync.pull: config ← live (import new, rewrite drifted dirs)
cli.flag.sync.bootstrap: import all live sessions into empty config
cli.flag.reload.busy: enqueue non-idle panes for deferred reload
cli.flag.reload.rc: override path to zsh rc file
tui.keymap.title: keymap
tui.history.title: action history
tui.modal.error.title: ⚠ error
tui.modal.empty.title: no sessions configured
tui.modal.empty.hint: press n to create your first one
tui.modal.kill.title: kill {{.target}}?
tui.modal.kill.body: this cannot be undone unless tmh undo recreates from a saved snapshot.
tui.settings.title: settings
tui.diff.back_hint: esc back · ↑/↓ navigate · s sync push (use CLI for now)
tui.palette.action.refresh.title: data refresh
tui.palette.action.refresh.subtitle: re-read listing from tmux (same as 'r')
tui.palette.action.reload.title: dotfile reload
tui.palette.action.reload.subtitle: source ~/.zshrc + ~/.tmux.conf (same as 'R')
tui.palette.action.sync.title: sync --push
tui.palette.action.sync.subtitle: create missing sessions/windows
tui.palette.action.diff.title: diff
tui.palette.action.diff.subtitle: show drift list
tui.palette.action.undo.title: undo
tui.palette.action.undo.subtitle: restore last destructive action
tui.palette.action.theme.title: theme: cycle
tui.palette.action.theme.subtitle: next catppuccin flavour
tui.palette.action.quit.title: quit
tui.palette.action.quit.subtitle: exit the TUI
tui.palette.action.attach.title: attach {{.name}}
tui.palette.action.attach.subtitle: {{.count}} windows
tui.no_sessions: no sessions yet — press n to create one
tui.attach_hint: press a / enter to attach this window
drift.reason.window_new: window in live, not in config
doctor.server.stopped: tmux server not running (will start on first action)
doctor.fd.missing: fd not installed (optional, used for file-picker)
doctor.notifier.missing: terminal-notifier not installed (optional, used for tmh watch)
doctor.goprivate.unset: GOPRIVATE does not include git.mark1708.ru (needed only for `go install` from self-hosted source)
wizard.new.name.title: session name
wizard.new.dir.title: working directory
wizard.new.layout.title: layout
wizard.new.group.title: group
wizard.new.group.desc: tag for tmh init --group; (none) to skip
wizard.new.save.title: save to config.yml?
wizard.new.attach.title: attach after create?
error.hook_denied: hooks denied — run with --no-hooks or trust the config
